name: Ts65Dn (001924)
description: Trisomy for a marker chromosome containing a segment of Mrpl39 to the telomere of Mmu16 homologous to Hsa21, translocated to the centromeric end of Mmu17. (Radiation induced translocation)
coords: Breakpoint is Chr16:84351351 bp and Chr17:9426822 bp

key_papers.title: A mouse model for Down syndrome exhibits learning and behaviour deficits
Trisomy 21 causes changes in the circuitry of the olfactory bulb

name: Ts65Dn (005252)
description: Trisomy for a marker chromosome containing a segment of Mrpl39 to the telomere of Mmu16 homologous to Hsa21, translocated to the centromeric end of Mmu17. These mice are homozygous for the wild-type allele of Pde6b to eliminate possible retinal degeneration and have slightly different phenotypes than Ts65Dn 001924. (Congenic made from radiation induced translocation)
coords: Breakpoint is Chr16:84351351 bp and Chr17:9426822 bp

name: Ts66Yah
description: This mouse strain is derived from the Ts65Dn 01924 strain and removes the non Hsa21 homologous Pisd-ps2 to Pde10a region derived from Mmu17 in the Ts65Dn mouse using CRISPR/Cas9. (CRISPR/Cas9 derivative of Ts65Dn)

name: Ts1Cje
description: Mice are trisomic for Sod1 to Mx1 and 94 genes on Mmu16 that are translocated to Mmu12, deleting 7 genes from Mmu12. Sod1 is not functionally triplicated because the Sod1 gene in the translocated segment is inactivated by the insertion of the neomycin resistance sequence. These mice are monosomic for 7 genes in Mmu12 (Duchon A, et al 2011 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/21953411/).
coords: Translocation breakpoint between positions 119278499 and 119289499, in the Dnahc11 gene, between exons 35 and 41.

name: Ts2Cje
description: Spontaneous fusion between the small marker chromosome in Ts65Dn mice (carrying Mrpl39 to the distal telomere of Mmu16) and Mmu12, forming a Robertsonian fusion chromosome.

name: Tc1
description: Contains freely segregating copy of Hsa21, with ~75% of Hsa21 in mouse. Mice are mosaic for the extra chromosome. The copy of Hsa21 has internal deletions and rearrangements (Gribble SM et al., 2013). https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/23596509/.
coords: Human chr21 coordinates (hg19, per Gribble et al., 2013): Tc1-Hsa21 shows multiple rearrangements; major copy-number changes include deletion Chr21: 18734534–19762829 (~959 kb) and deletion Chr21:33640510–36370035 (~2.73 Mb); plus a duplicated segment Chr21:28,490,850–48,680,190 (~20.19 Mb) with additional complex internal CNVs/rearrangements (see Table 1 and Fig. 1 in Gribble et al., 2013)
orthologs: 227 (Gribble et al., 2013 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3626651/ ) *includes duplications and anticipated single copy genes)

key_papers.title: A non-human animal model of Down syndrome with a complete extra chromosome

name: TcMAC21
genes: 144 (Kazuki Y, et al. 2020 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32597754/ )(581 total genes which includes 199 PCGs and 382 nPCGs; number excludes 49 KRTAPs and six human-specific PCGs) Hsa21 orthologs
description: Contains freely segregating copy of Hsa21 with 93% of Hsa21 represented in the mouse.
orthologs: 144 (Kazuki Y, et al. 2020 https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32597754/ )(581 total genes which includes 199 PCGs and 382 nPCGs; number excludes 49 KRTAPs and six human-specific PCGs)

name: Ts1Rhr
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP sites in regions proximal to Cbr1 and distal to Fam3b results in duplication of the genes, excluding Cbr1 and including Fam3b, in the region that is syntenic with the distal part of Hsa21q22. Also produced the reciprocal deletion as Ms1Rhr.

name: Dp(16)1Yey
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP sites in regions proximal to D930038D03Rik (Lipi) and distal to Zfp295 (Zbtb21) resulted in the duplication of the genes

key_papers.title: Trisomic and disomic reciprocal crosses between Dp(16)1Yey and normal mice exhibit the same level of Down syndrome-associated phenotypes

name: Dp(16)2Yey
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP sites in regions proximal to Tiam1 and distal to Kcnj6 resulted in the duplication of the genes, including Tiam1 and Kcnj6, in the region that is syntenic with the part of Hsa21q22.

name: Dp(10)1Yey
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu10 between loxP sites in regions proximal to Prmt2 and distal to Pdxk results in duplication of the genes, including Prmt2 and Pdxk, in the region that is syntenic with the distal part of Hsa21q22.

name: Dp(17)1Yey
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu17 between loxP sites in regions proximal to Abcg1 and distal to Rrp1b results in duplication of the genes, including Abcg1 and Rrp1b, in the region that is syntenic with the proximal part of Hsa21q22.

key_papers.title: Mouse models of Down syndrome, Alzheimer's disease, and aging

name: Dp(16)3Yey
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP sites in regions proximal to Tiam1 and distal to Il10rb resulted in the duplication of the genes, including Tiam1 and Il10rb, in the region that is syntenic with the part of Hsa21q22.

name: Dp(16)4Yey
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP sites in regions proximal to Ifnar1 and distal to Kcnj6 resulted in the duplication of the genes, including Ifnar1 and Kcnj6, in the region that is syntenic with the part of Hsa21q22.

name: Ts1Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu17 between loxP inserted in Abcg1 and downstream of Cbs (before U2af1) region resulted in the deletion of Abcg1 and the duplication of the segment homologous and syntenic to the Hsa21q22.

name: Ts2Yah/Dp2Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP inserted in Hspa13 and App resulted in the inactivation of both flanking genes and the duplication of the segment homologous to Hsa21q11-q21.

name: Ts3Yah/Dp3Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Hsa16 between loxP inserted in Cstb and Col6a1 resulted in the inactivation of both flanking genes and the duplication of the segment homologous to Hsa21.

name: Ts4Yah/Dp4Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP inserted in Cstb and Prmt2 resulted in the inactivation of both flanking genes and the duplication of the segment homologous to Hsa21

name: Ts5Yah/Dp5Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between loxP inserted in App and Runx1 resulted in the inactivation of both flanking genes and the duplication of the segment homologous to chromosome 21.

name: Dp(16)7Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between Samsn1 and Cldn17

name: Dp(16)8Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between Tiam1 and Clic6

description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between Cldn17 and Brwd1

name: Dp(16)13Yah
description: Cre-mediated chromosomal rearrangement on Mmu16 between Cldn17 to Vps26c, up to the sequence of Dyrk1a which is inactivated

name: TcHSA21rat
genes: 145 (The number of orthologous PCGs is 145 after subtracting 17 PCGs in 21p, 46 KRTAPs and 6 human-specific PCGs from total number of 214.) Hsa21 orthologs
description: First transchromosomic rat model of Down syndrome. Contains a freely segregating, EGFP-labeled human chromosome 21 (HSA21) with >93% of HSA21 protein-coding genes. Maintained via female transmission on Wistar background.
orthologs: 145 (The number of orthologous PCGs is 145 after subtracting 17 PCGs in 21p, 46 KRTAPs and 6 human-specific PCGs from total number of 214.)
